title: nephrodium cicutarium
intro: Nephrodium cicutarium, also known as the cleft liverwort, is a type of lichenized, perennial plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium cicutarium include treating various skin issues, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever. Nephrodium cicutarium can be prepared in herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
